FHA loans in Orange County, Florida

FHA loans across Orange County with as little as 3.5% down. Here's the county's 2026 FHA loan limit, why the Orlando area suits FHA buyers, and how to get pre-approved.

Orange County Home Loans

FHA loans in Orange County, Florida

Orange County is the heart of the Orlando metro — one of the country's fastest-growing regions, powered by tourism, healthcare, and a booming tech and simulation sector. That growth fuels constant new construction at prices that largely fit under the FHA limit, making Orange County a magnet for first-time buyers and families relocating to Central Florida. FHA's 3.5% down is a natural fit here.

Orange County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Orange County

With the 2026 FHA floor of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Orange County home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). Across most of Orange County, that covers the large majority of homes, including much of the new construction. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so we confirm Orange County's exact figure with HUD.

Growth, new construction, and FHA in Orange County

The Orlando area's relentless new construction is tailor-made for FHA — modern homes that clear the FHA appraisal and sit within the loan limit, perfect for first-time buyers. The metro also has a large condo market (especially near attractions and downtown); for those, confirm FHA approval via our condo guide. Pair FHA with Florida assistance and get pre-approved before you compete for homes.

Cities We Serve

FHA loans in Orange County cities

We help FHA buyers throughout Orange County, including Orlando. Explore our local guides for a closer look at the market, loan limits, and down payment help in each:

Orlando

Down payment help in Orange County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Orange County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Orange County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Orange County for 2026?+
Orange County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers most homes in the county. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is the Orlando area good for FHA buyers?+
Yes — rapid growth, abundant new construction, and prices that largely fit the FHA limit make Orange County one of Central Florida's best FHA markets.
Does FHA work for new-construction homes in Orange County?+
Yes — newer homes typically pass the FHA appraisal easily and sit within the loan limit.
How much down payment do I need in Orange County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Orange County?+
Yes — Orlando, Winter Park, Apopka, Ocoee, and every community in the county.
